title: Smoky Dense Show-off Tomato Stir-fry
description: A Middle Eastern-inspired dish featuring smoked tomatoes and red wine jelly as the star ingredient, this show-off recipe is egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 4 large tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Use smoked or sun-dried tomatoes for smokiness.

ingredients.name: 1 cup red wine jelly
ingredients.notes: Ensure it’s safe to consume as per safety regulations.

instructions: Gently heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic if using, sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Carefully add tomatoes along with lemon juice. Let them cook without stirring for about 5 minutes to get some color development and caramelization.
Stir in the smoked or sun-dried tomato pieces and continue cooking for another 4-5 minutes until most of the liquid has evaporated.
Fold in the red wine jelly, lower heat to maintain a simmer. Allow it to meld with the tomatoes for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and cumin, adjust seasoning if necessary, ensuring everything is well-combined.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice for added authenticity.
